name: @amo/plugin-extratheme
description: Enhance NocoBase theming: custom background (image/gradient/color), transparency, frosted-glass, and top/side navigation style — for /admin, /v and the sign-in page. Configured globally in plugin settings; disabled by default.
description.zh-CN: 强化 NocoBase 主题能力：自定义背景（图片/渐变/纯色）、透明度、毛玻璃、顶部/侧边导航栏风格，覆盖 /admin、/v 与登录页。插件设置页统一全局配置，默认关闭。
